# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release Workflow

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - v*

jobs:
  build-and-release:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js (if publishing to npm)
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') && github.event_name == 'push'
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: '14'

    - name: Set up Python (if publishing to PyPI)
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') && github.event_name == 'push'
      uses: actions/setup-python@v2
      with:
        python-version: '3.8'

    - name: Install dependencies (Node.js)
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') && github.event_name == 'push'
      run: npm install

    - name: Build application
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') && github.event_name == 'push'
      run: npm run build  # or any other build command for your app

    - name: Create release
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') && github.event_name == 'push'
      id: create_release
      uses: actions/create-release@v1
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      with:
        tag_name: ${{ github.ref }}
        release_name: Release ${{ github.ref }}
        draft: false
        prerelease: false

    - name: Publish to npm
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') && github.event_name == 'push'
      run: |
        echo "//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}" > ~/.npmrc
        npm publish --access public

    - name: Publish to PyPI
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') && github.event_name == 'push'
      run: |
        python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel
        twine upload dist/* --repository pypi --username __token__ --password ${{ secrets.PYPI_TOKEN }}
